description_long: This stuffed toy features a cartoonish, anthropomorphic black and white cat with a large round head, wide eyes, and a broad, friendly smile. The face is white with black outlines for the eyes and mouth, and the rest of the head and body are a glossy black. The toy has outstretched arms with white-gloved hands, each finger clearly defined, and short, rounded legs ending in brown shoes. The back of the toy is entirely black, with no additional markings or features. The overall appearance is smooth and shiny, with a playful and inviting demeanor, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A glossy black and white cartoon cat stuffed toy with outstretched arms, white-gloved hands, and brown shoes, featuring a friendly smiling face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cat's expressive face, outstretched arms, white-gloved hands, and brown shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the roundness of the head and body, with one arm and shoe visible, and the profile of the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, featureless black back, with both arms and shoes visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other arm and shoe, and the side profile of the head.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a broad, smiling mouth. The eyebrows are arched, adding to the playful and welcoming look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched to the sides and legs slightly apart, head facing forward.
